rationale: The cited paper is used as a core prior anchor for unplanned in-store consideration research, not as a passing background mention. The citing article explicitly frames a limitation of prior work including Hui et al. (2013) (treating unplanned purchases as motivation-homogeneous) and builds its contribution around that gap. It also relies on related constructs and operationalization from that stream (e.g., unplanned consideration in video-tracked shopping and within-trip consideration dynamics).
relation_description: The citing paper extends Hui et al. (2013) by moving from unplanned consideration/conversion patterns to a motivation-based account of unplanned purchasing dynamics. It adds buying impulsivity and motivation balancing as central mechanisms while using closely related in-store consideration concepts and field/experimental designs.
